title: Tracker auth autopairing via hub redirect
body:
Pairing link `/settings/auth/pair?code=…` autopairs when `TRACKER_PUBLIC_URL` is set, using `GITHUB_SYNC_TOKEN` or admin session.

## What shipped

- Autopairing support (`574a84c`)
- Auth session fixes (`742f086`, `1e3e3cf`)
- Auth/Tracker refactor (`801f1e2`)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`574a84c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/574a84c)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-03

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `tracker-implementation`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-tracker-ship`
